description: 5 reference sets of Listen & Repeat sentences, each with 7 sentences in progressive difficulty (2 easy + 3 medium + 2 hard). All sentences spoken by a staff/authority figure in a specific campus/community location.

medium.structure: one clause, compound subject or object

hard.structure: complex clause, conditional, or multiple parts

patterns.speaker_role: staff or authority figure (tech, librarian, guide, agent, director)

sentences.sentence: Welcome to the IT help desk.
Do you have your student ID?
We can replace your laptop charger at the front counter.
Software updates are installed automatically every Friday evening.
You'll need to restart your device after the update is complete.
If you experience any issues with the campus Wi-Fi, please submit a support ticket online.
Late equipment returns will result in a temporary suspension of your borrowing privileges.
The library is open daily.
Quiet study rooms are upstairs.
You can reserve a group study room through the website.
All printed materials must be returned within two weeks.
The digital catalog can be accessed from any campus computer.
If you need help locating a specific journal article, ask at the reference desk.
Students are responsible for returning all borrowed materials by the due date.
Please step inside the dome.
The show begins in five minutes.
Tonight we will explore the constellations of the winter sky.
The projector will simulate a journey through the solar system.
Please silence your phones before the presentation starts.
You may notice the ceiling lights dimming slowly as the stars begin to appear.
Afterward, a guest astronomer will be available to answer all your questions.
Please sign the rental contract.
Your vehicle is in lot B.
Insurance coverage is included in the base price.
The fuel tank should be full when you return the car.
Please report any damage to the vehicle before driving off.
If you plan to drive across state lines, you must notify us in advance.
Late returns will result in an extra daily charge added to your credit card.
Welcome to our first rehearsal.
Scripts are on the front table.
We will run through the first act without stopping.
Please pay attention to your blocking during the opening scene.
The costume fitting is scheduled for next Wednesday afternoon.
If you have a conflict with any rehearsal dates, let the stage manager know immediately.
Make sure to bring a water bottle and wear comfortable clothing for our stage exercises.
